narrative:
Marion County has 38,374 registered voters, with 57.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.4%, a clear Republican lean of 11.3 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.3% of registrants.
